privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated ODT document representing a Voter Information Pamphlet. All metadata elements including the main title ('2026 Official Voter Information Pamphlet'), measure headings, section headings, body samples, and signature samples are verified to exactly match the text dynamically injected via the python script within setup_task.sh.
